text: I am grateful to be awake and alive today.
I choose calm, focus, and energy this morning.
I am capable of handling whatever today brings.
Today I move toward my goals, one small step at a time.
I am confident, clear, and ready to build.
My mind is sharp, my body is awake, my heart is open.
I attract good ideas and good people today.
I let go of yesterday — today is a fresh page.
Tonight, name 3 things that went well today.
Who made your day better today? Thank them tomorrow.
What is one small thing you're grateful for right now?
